---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

Describe the use case. What are you trying to do that is hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Screenshots, recordings, or links to similar tools that do this well.
